programme.title: Arthur: I Wanna Hold Your Hand/Whistling in the Wind
programme.desc: During a shopping trip to the mall, Binky gets caught doing the uncoolest of all the uncool things in the world--holding his mom's hand! If the Tibbles are supposed to be exactly the same, why can Tommy whistle while Timmy can't?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider
programme.desc: Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: So Long, Spanky/Buster's New Friend
programme.desc: D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa
programme.desc: The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real
programme.desc: When Francine has a big paper over Thanksgiving, she copies from a website. There's nothing wrong with that, is there? Everyone loves the new Top Supermarket reality series on TV, except Arthur. Will it end his friendship with Buster?

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale

programme.desc: Baby Bop, BJ and the children prepare for the Shapes Carnival in the park./When it starts to rain at the park, Baby Bop joins Barney and BJ inside the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Predacons Rising
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 2
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Decepticon Air

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: This Is Why I Hate Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 1
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon. Rachet insists on going there right away to save him, but Prime refuses, knowing that they are too weak to fight Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor Tom Conti and presenter Katie Derham fight it out with James Braxton and James Lewis to turn £400 into profit. Their journey takes them around East Sussex starting in Lewes and ending with an auction in Wandsworth.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and explorer Brian Blessed takes to the road with comedian Jenny Eclair accompanied by James Braxton and Anita Manning. They begin in Cockermouth and head south through Cumbria, ending up at an auction showdown in Runcorn.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Master of bowling spin Phil Tufnell battles it out with BBC Breakfast's sports presenter Chris Hollins for the best deals on antiques. Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant are on hand to advise as they tour the southeast toward auction in London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Bond girls Honor Blackman and Britt Ekland hit the road in their Aston Martin to relive some 007 classics with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. They're out to make a profit as they roar toward an auction in Greenwich, London.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Cheerleader Murder, San Quentin Escape, Rosemary's Spirits, Insecurity Guard, Mom & Pop Murders update and Shigemoto's Bodyguard.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Pix of the Dead, Johnny Lee Wilson (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD) and Totally Exhausted.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Burbank Robbers, BC Sea Monster, Vision Quest, Florida Film Flam and Thumper.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Alamo Treasure, Hospital Escape, Huey's Quest and UD: Meredith's Mother.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Falcon Lake UFO, Inside Frontera, UD: Loving's Lost Love and Disappearing Dad.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Hotel of Horror
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension heads to Halewood and investigates the Wellington Hotel, believed to be a hive of paranormal activity. Will they uncover what is haunting this public house?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Who is There?
programme.desc: Could a cemetery be haunted? The team come head out to find out and contact restless souls that have been haunting the graveyard.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Man with a Cane
programme.desc: The team head to Bolton and investigate the Old Three Crowns. Haunted by the spirit of a very angry man with a deadly cane and an upset, young, ghostly girl, will they uncover why the girl is so upset? And could they encounter the angry spirit man?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: I Hear a Baby Crying
programme.desc: The team investigate the Market Hotel in Bolton. Believed to be haunted by the lost soul of a previous landlord and a guest who likes to make herself known. They make contact with spirits from the other side and witness first hand paranormal activity.

programme.title: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Town
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates the entire town of Alexandria, Louisiana, where paranormal activity seems to lurk around every corner.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pennsylvania Asylum
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Chester County, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennhurst Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Century of Haunting
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Oxford, Massachusetts to help a family in need. The house has been in the Voas family for two generations, and lots of activity has been reported, from apparitions to shadow figures.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Phantoms
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to America's most haunted city, New Orleans, to investigate the Old U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hotel Haunts Unleashed
programme.desc: On this episode on Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to South Dakota for the first time to investigate the Alex Johnson Hotel, a place filled with history.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mission Point Resort on Mackinac Island. Constructed in the 1950's as a summer destination, it becomes nearly deserted in the winter time, and perfect for the team to investigate.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dealer, Gratuity, The Cake, 1st Time Offender, The Mirror of Truth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Moonstruck Beach, Healing Hands, Aspen Sunny Side, Night Walker, Hot Car.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Prince Valiant
programme.desc: In a time now lost in the mists of memory, the great King Arthur rules in the legendary citadel that is Camelot. Starring: Joanna Lumley, Stephen Moyer, Katherine Heigl, Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly get married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: A Chorus Line
programme.desc: After narrowing down hundreds of Broadway hopefuls, choreographer Zach (Michael Douglas) leads a select group of dancers on an audition that could change their lives forever in this stunning adaptation of the hit Broadway musical.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Gambler
programme.desc: Earp is blamed for the back shooting of the saloon owner Bennett after exposing his crooked games.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Killer
programme.desc: After Earp kicks Bennett out of Wichita for a crooked Faro game, Bennett hires the killer Mannon Clemens to kill Earp and have his cowboys tree the town.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: John Wesley Hardin
programme.desc: John Wesley Hardin comes to Wichita to seek revenge on Earp for running his friend Clemens out of Wichita.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Wounded bank robber Clem Parker and his girl Bonnie Dawson want no part of Tarp Anders' brash gang of thieves, but Wyatt isn't sure whether to believe them or not.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: King of the Cattle Trails
programme.desc: Texan A.H. 'Shanghai' Pierce tries to use his money and influence to make Wichita an open town again by hiring a well-known actress to get to Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Big Baby Contest
programme.desc: Earp is appointed chairman of a baby contest run by the local women. When a poor woman with a baby arrives in town, Earp enters her in the contest but finds a hidden rule may ruin the plans.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Frontier Journalism was Fearless
programme.desc: Local gamblers feeling pressure from Earp concoct a scheme to force the mayor of Wichita to get rid of Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Trail's End for a Cowboy
programme.desc: An immature rancher's son forced to sell a herd at a low price tries to make up the difference in a poker game while drunk and loses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Rich Man's Son
programme.desc: The young runaway son of a powerful railroad executive wants to become a gun-toting cowhand, but Wyatt manages to teach him some far more important lessons about honor and self-reliance.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to prove his theory that a series of unexplained catastrophes are the result of powerful winds found in the upper atmosphere coming down to ground level.

programme.title: The Battle of Midway: Dauntless
programme.desc: A U.S. carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway in June 1942. During the battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea. Amid the vast openness of the Pacific, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Evil Doctor
programme.desc: Expectant parents Aubrey and Matt find their lives haunted, and their marriage tested, by an unhinged OB GYN with a mysterious past and who is after their child.

programme.title: Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: When a popular Philadelphia restaurant critic suspects that her husband is cheating on her, she hires a private investigator who turns out to have his own agenda.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Sterling Brooks, a self-absorbed stock broker, is killed in a freak golfing accident. In order to secure a heavenly future, Sterling is given the opportunity to help a needy young girl reunite with her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Magical Adventures in the Forbidden City
programme.desc: In another world Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed years ago because of a disease. She takes us on a magical adventure, rising against the forces in command and shows how being brave and following your heart can show anything is possible.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Target Earth
programme.desc: When aliens have infiltrated society by inhabiting bodies of select human beings, they plan a full-scale invasion of Earth. A detective finds the information that can stop the attack; however the information is in the mind of a six-year-old child.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Windstorm
programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: The Adventures of Greyfriars Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby, a brave Skye Terrier, becomes a local legend when he refuses to leave his master's grave after he dies. Based on true events.

programme.title: Mail Order Monster
programme.desc: A girl seeks help and guidance from a robot monster to cope with the bullies at school and her father's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Untouchable
programme.desc: The team investigate the death of a conspiracy-obsessed woman.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Do Or Die
programme.desc: The team find themselves immersed in the competitive world of overprivileged youth.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: The shooting of an old man looks like an open-and-shut case.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Food For Thought
programme.desc: The team investigate the explosion of a gourmet food truck.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team suspect that a woman's death might be the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Life Sentence
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac becomes part of a vendetta.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Mac tries to find a little girl who has been missing since 2002.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a shooter targets where Delko is staying, Horatio has to look into Delko's past.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a wealthy racehorse owner.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As the team tackles a case involving a dead doctor, Calleigh falls into a coma.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: New evidence appears that may prove a convicted murderer's innocence.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder suspect tries to throw the CSIs off his trail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a man during his ex-wife's divorce party.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a blackjack dealer whose estranged husband has ties to a club of UFO believers.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: In order to save the lives of three judges, Sylvester goes undercover in federal prison but Team Scorpion must break him out when his life is threatened. Kevin Weisman guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe, and Happy are trapped with the crew in a top-secret submarine when an explosion sends it to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Super Fun Guys
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the "Super Fun Guy" movie set in Kazakstan in order to disable a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Three Musketeers
programme.desc: The MovieSphere Channel is serving up an endless stream of top-quality movies, from blockbuster hits to cult classics and everything in between.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown.

programme.title: Beyond Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham uses a shape-shifting monster to destroy Robin Hood (Robin Dunne).

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: An Englishwoman recruits a retired major, a spinster and a teacher to steal furs for charity.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A flirtatious travel agent gives all his girlfriends keys to his flat, which seemingly backfires.

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins, a penniless lawyer, has spent most of his money on liquor. When he interrupts a robbery at work, he is targeted by a gang of thieves who determine that, his relatives, are richer than he is.

programme.title: Medium: Once In A Lifetime
programme.desc: When Ariel begins dating a boy from school, Allison has visions that indicate he may be involved in a local murder.

programme.title: Medium: The Future's So Bright
programme.desc: After strangely becoming sensitive to light, Allison wears a pair of sunglasses that display strange numbers which may be related to people's life expectancies.

programme.title: Medium: You Give Me Fever
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium: An Everlasting Love
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Medium: Dear Dad...
programme.desc: As the anniversary of Devalos' daughter's death come to pass, Devalos is haunted by memories of the traumatic event. Meanwhile, Allison has dreams of the extreme measures Devalos went to put his daughter's killer in jail.

programme.title: Medium: Psych
programme.desc: Allison dreams about a schizophrenic child, but when she meets her in real life, she seems perfectly normal -- but has a mentally ill roommate.

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: JAG: Prisoner
programme.desc: Chicom agents capture Harm in Hong Kong; they vigorously question him in mainland China about official matters.

programme.title: JAG: Ares
programme.desc: Someone kills a Naval officer on Okinawa, then his ship encounters major trouble during war games at sea

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules and Sam receive some personal news, but don't know whether to share it with the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed and Greg's sons come for a ride along and disobey a direct order from Sergeant Parker when he tells them to remain in the truck while Team One deals with an incident between three cops on an off-the-books mission to clean up the streets.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is called in when an Emotionally Disturbed Person kidnaps his neighbor's baby, thinking it's his own daughter, and takes refuge on a ferry.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One faces the most challenging call of their careers when a series of bombs tears the city apart.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One continues the hunt for a bomber at large as team members, joined by EMS and the military, split up to deal with multiple bomb threats in a city already plunged into chaos.

programme.title: 6 Below
programme.desc: An adrenaline seeking snowboarder gets lost in a massive winter storm in the back country of the High Sierras. Starring: Josh Hartnett, Mira Sorvino, Sarah Dumont. It is based on the book Crystal Clear by Eric LeMarque and Davin Seay.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
programme.desc: Based on the novel, a young gypsy becomes a Minister's obsession in 1483. Only the bell ringer and her husband and the court of miracles can save her.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Avenging Phantom / Myth Conceptions
programme.desc: Ten year old Jimmy is afraid to sleep in the dark. / While digging in Greece, a greedy Fortune Hunter searches out the ancient cave ruins of the Greek legend Medusa.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Weeping Woman
programme.desc: It's a dark and stormy night when Mildred and Camille's car breaks down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: All the Gory Details!
programme.desc: A Mad Scientist went missing in the 1930's.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Dead Men Don't Jump!
programme.desc: Seventeen year old Nathan is a star athlete who would do anything to play pro basketball.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Haunted Mine
programme.desc: Convinced that his Aunt Melva is too old and helpless to live on her own, a young city boy named Dale drives out to the "sticks" to retrieve her.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Wendell has had his share of bullying from pranksters Chet and Louie.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Brothers Gruff
programme.desc: When neighbourhood Ghost, Goblin and Troll Expert "Sheldon" tells his best buddy Eddie that there's a Troll under the bridge and it's following him home.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Uncle Harry's Horrible House of Horrors
programme.desc: Uncle Harry is a miserable old grump who wouldn't know how to have a good time if it ran up and bit him.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.desc: A small town U. S. marshal, bitter because he has no opportunity to make a name for himself, finally gets a chance to become famous.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Running low on petrol, Stevie (Simmone Jade Mackinnon) and Terry (John Jarratt) stop at a decrepit truckstop run by an old drunk named Ken Logan (Harold Hopkins).

programme.desc: Tess (Bridie Carter) has some extra feed on her hands, having inadvertently over-ordered. She gives it to Nick (Myles Pollard) and Alex (Aaron Jeffery).

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater

programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!

programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Prelude To Murder

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Tyrant's Daughter

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Neurotic Detective

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Betty's fiancé is murdered. Holmes has a theory about the murder, and tries to prove it.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: After a famous criminal is run over and killed by a milk wagon, Insp. Lestrade finds a mysterious coded note in the man's clothing.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Visiting a home of high nobility, a businessman is murdered.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Watson claims that he was hit in the eye by Albert Higgins a half hour after he had watched him die.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A team of previous winners returns to challenge the remaining contestants; each team designs its own menus for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final five chefs must impress tough critics with a gourmet burger; a huge misstep brings dinner service to a halt; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With the grand finale just around the corner, the remaining chefs are challenged to replicate a sample dish using taste, texture and sight alone. The winner is rewarded with a $1,000 shopping spree before another taxing evening service begins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay presides over the penultimate episode of the US cooking competition as this year's explosive series nears its climax. Three contestants soon become two as Gordon names the second finalist.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay presides over the final episode of the US cooking competition as this year's explosive series reaches its climax. Gordon informs Mary and Ja'Nel that their teams will be creating dishes for two tables of celebrity diners.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: One contestant's overly speedy delivery arouses Gordon's suspicions. Will they be able to win back his respect during the first dinner service of the series?

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gangsta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check

programme.title: Legend Hunters: The Ark of the Covenant

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Paris enlists Nev and Max to help her figure out who has been catfishing her for the past four years. But as the guys investigate, they make a shocking discovery. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max receive emails from opposite sides of the same online romance, each concerned that the other may be a catfish! What happens next leaves Nev and Max stunned! (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 102

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler attend their high school graduation. Maci considers joining Ryan on his family vacation. Farrah has to deal with her parents' overbearing concerns. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Gary and Leah visit Amber in rehab and Farrah goes on a date with her neighbour. Maci joins Ryan's family vacation and Catelynn and Tyler question letting Butch move back into their home. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Germany launched Operation Barbarossa, a savage and merciless attack on the Soviet Union. Now, newly colorised film and amateur home movies provide an unprecedented inside look at this brutal conflict.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Stunning, newly colorised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wardens: Three-Fifty-Seven
programme.desc: This week, game wardens try and track down a potential poacher who took a deer out of season. Then, we'll follow another warden as he takes his son hunting when his son draws a hard to come by moose tag.

programme.title: Wardens: Mercy Kill
programme.desc: Warden Kambic investigates a wounded elk and the hunter who tried to do the right thing.

programme.title: Wardens: Tangled
programme.desc: A wounded deer has locked horns with another buck creating a dilemma for Warden Burroughs.

programme.title: Wardens: 18 Minutes

programme.title: Wardens: Thin Ice

programme.title: Wardens: 700 Yards
programme.desc: On this episode of Wardens, Joe Kambic patrols Deer Lodge, Montana and Kqyn Kuka attempts to rescue a sick buck from the ice.

programme.desc: This week on Wardens, its elk hunting season in Montana and Bryan Golie is after suspicious hunters, and Paul Luepke addresses two hunters shot mule deer does without the proper permits.

programme.desc: Dangerous log jams on the Flathead River threaten unprepared boaters and tubers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wildfire

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives!
programme.desc: Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap
programme.desc: After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Moving Along
programme.desc: Barney plays a fun game of "Simon Says" with Baby Bop and BJ in the park. They demonstrate how to move their bodies through dancing and playing games.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Comrade
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon. The Decepticons arrive to combat them. Optimus Prime finds his old minicon partner.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Soldier
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him. Hot Shot learns a lesson in cooperation.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Jungle
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Carnival
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival. Billy and Fred see them transform and try to capture one, but are thwarted by Hot Shot.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Palace
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking, but who will reach it first - the children or the Decepticon Demolishor?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Underground
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city, and there's the usual scramble to see which side can get to it first. And a new transformer makes himself known - but which side is he on?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.desc: Terence escapes from WOOHP and frees several of the spies' former arch villains in the process.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for Dipsy to have some Tubby Toast. The Teletubbies watch some children have fun in their paddling pool on a sunny day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run up to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Sparkly Spider. The Tubbies dance a dizzy dance and the magical tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are running around the house, but stop to see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say "Eh-oh", and then run off to watch two children go for a ride in a hovercraft. The Teletubbies are very careful not to drop their Tubby blankets on the floor, but if they do, the Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind the hills to say “Eh-oh!” before watching three children and Andy Brown look in Rock pools for shrimps. Tinky Winky, Dipsy & Laa-Laa look for Po.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies laugh as they bump tummies. Then they watch some children play a body to body game. The Teletubbies love to play, they play a falling down game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, some voice trumpets rise and make some funny animal noises. They baa like sheep, moo like cows, meow like cats and oink like pigs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the sound of a whistle; Tinky Winky laughs when he hears the sound. The Tubbies watch some children who march and twirl their batons to music.

programme.title: Knights of Can-A-Lot
programme.desc: Bob, Wendy and the team get a big surprise when Bob's father Robert comes to visit. When stern Ms Chalmers from the National Heritage asks Bob to renovate the old castle a case of mistaken identity leaves Bob’s father in charge!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage. The gang set off for Mr Ellis’s and Pilchard sneaks along – she knows that cottages are popular with mice! At the cottage, Mr Ellis reports some strange goings-on at the cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day. The team are building Farmer Pickles new factory which will turn sunflowers into sunflower oil. Everyone is excited to meet Marjorie, who arrives by bicycle. Marjorie has been brought on board by Farmer Pickles to manage the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have been asked to replace some burst pipes under the main road. Meanwhile Jenny is in town to persuade Wendy to take a much-needed holiday. Unfortunately, there’s lots of work to do and Wendy simply doesn’t have time to go away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys’, while Wendy goes to JJ’s yard with Lofty and Dizzy to collect a steel joist and other materials. Lofty is nervous about carrying the joist, but Dizzy and Trix race off with the bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles’ sheep, which has to be ready for the lambing season. Farmer Pickles brings the sheep down from the hills and puts them in a pen until the barn is finished.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and Wendy are converting an old shop into a brand new restaurant for Mr Sabatini. Mr Sabatini asks Wendy to be the guest of honour at the grand opening. She is delighted but terrified at the prospect of giving a speech in public.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop is keen to enter the town’s snowman competition, but a burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini’s needs fixing. Scoop is anxious when he sees the snowman that Mr Sabatini has made for the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has promised to put a cat flap in his kitchen door for Pilchard, but he gets an urgent call from Farmer Pickles who needs a fence built to keep the rabbits out of his lettuce field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building the road connecting Bob’s mobile home site with the location of the new yard. It’s a big job for Roley, but just as Bob’s explaining the job, a pretty little bird flies overhead clutching some twigs in her beak.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert and Dot, Bob’s Mum and Dad are visiting the Valley. Bob shows them around, pointing out their recycling storeroom. Robert notices Bob’s old rubble chute. Bob explains that he hasn’t had much use for it out in the valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor decides that the town needs a drive-in cinema and Bob is asked to build it out in the countryside. The first film to be shown will be “The Invasion of the Giant Bug.”

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a lean-to for Mr Beasley’s allotment. Wendy offers to pick up the materials from JJ’s yard, while Bob makes a start on the cement floor. But before he can leave, Bob gets a call from Mr Dixon, who needs a hole in his roof fixed urgently.

programme.title: Nick Dunlap Wins The American Express 2024
programme.desc: Nick Dunlap becomes the first amateur to win on the PGA TOUR since 1991 with his victory at The American Express 2024. The University of Alabama sophomore is the second-youngest winner on TOUR in the last 90 years.

programme.title: Davis Riley Wins Charles Schwab Challenge

programme.desc: Bond girls Honor Blackman and Britt Ekland hit the road in their Aston Martin to relive some 007 classics with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. They're out to make a profit as they roar toward an auction in Greenwich, London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Father and son team Dan and Peter Snow go head-to-head with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson on the hunt for the best antique deals as they travel through Hampshire and along the south coast, ending at an auction in Billingshurst, Sussex.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sir Terry Wogan and Caroline Quentin add a touch of class as they seek profits to donate to Children In Need. In a classic 1948 Jaguar MK 4 they tour Oxfordshire with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson toward a showdown in Chiswick, London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: British treasures Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie team up with experts Catherine Southon and James Lewis. They trawl the UK for fabulous antiques, from Potters Bar, through Hampstead and ending at auction in Heathfield, East Sussex.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Road Map Clues, Past Phone Calls, Miracle Cross, She Finds Fugitives and Phone Call Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Oklahoma City Rescuers, UD: Baby Given Away, Carolina Cop Killer & UD, Vince Foster and Crime Novelist.

programme.title: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The House of The Devil
programme.desc: The island of Gran Canaria houses some of the most haunted buildings in the world and tonight the team fly to the island and investigate claims of satanic worship and paranormal activity in a house that is believed to have been built by the Devil himself

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate ruins of The Orangery in Merseyside and claims that the ghost of a grey lady is haunting the location. They capture some of the most compelling paranormal evidence they have ever encountered.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: What Haunts Inside?
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mission Point Resort on Mackinac Island. Constructed in the 1950's as a summer destination, it becomes nearly deserted in the winter time, and perfect for the team to investigate.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Residual Haunts
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Prospect, Maine to investigate Fort Knox, built before the Civil War to protect the Penobscot narrows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Knights of the Living Dead
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Worcester, Massachusetts to investigate the Higgins Armory, the only armory in the western hemisphere devoted to arms and armor.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT2
programme.desc: The team continue their most threatening investigation yet and for some they will be scared for life mentally and physically. The most violent poltergeist in the world is ready for a fight...but who wins?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Thackray Museum
programme.desc: The medical museum houses a great many objects from its distant hospital and workhouse past with a complete Victorian street scene on the lower level.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Kirby, Dust, Malibu Cop, A Joyful Noise, The Hooded Chair.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Viewing, The Subway, Kid in the Closet, Justice is Served, The Tractor.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Devil's Tattoo, Static Man, The Bloody Hand, Where Have All the Heroes Gone, War Surplus.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Merry-Go-Round, Red Eyed Creature, Used Car Salesman, Surveillance Camera, Graffiti.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Out of Service, When I Was Big, The Greedy Investor, Seven Hours of Bad Luck, The Secret of the Coins.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: Robocar Poli

programme.title: Robocar Poli
