programme.desc: They've got a sailor looking for his first home and a soldier who's about to be made homeless.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Arthur: Mom and Dad Have A Great Big Fight/D.W.'s Perfect Wish
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad fight over spilled milk, Arthur and D.W. fear the worst. Is it Arthur's fault or D.W.'s? Then, turning five is a major, big deal event! But D.W. worries that she fribbled away her preschool years on meaningless pursuits.

programme.title: Arthur: 1001 Dads/Prunella's Prediction
programme.desc: When Buster insists that he will miss the Father's Day picnic because he has other plans, Arthur is convinced that he's really sad and embarrassed about his parents’ divorce. And Prunella predicts a gift of flashpants, the hot new fashion.

programme.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur
programme.desc: Pack your bags, buckle your seatbelts, and get ready for an ARTHUR road trip to the family farm! Arthur’s Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) are off to Ohio to join in the festivities.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself
programme.desc: When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur: To Eat or Not to Eat/S.W.E.A.T.
programme.desc: A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Overmatch
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Trust
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vacation
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in. With Red Alert trapped in a mudslide, the sluice gates about to open, and local reporter Kelly filming, how will the Autobots escape detection?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Reinforcement
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player. The Decepticons acquire the final minicon to create the Skyboom Shield, the most powerful defensive weapon in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Decisive Battle
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Skyscrapers and Car Parks
programme.desc: Join Bob on his next visit On Site! Follow Bob and the team as they take us through the construction of skyscrapers & car parks. Learn how skyscrapers are built up high on strong foundations and see how lifts are needed to carry people to the top.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Trains and Treehouses
programme.desc: Bob and his ‘Can-Do’ crew are back on site with a brand new adventure! Join Bob as he builds a train set for Mr Bentley as a birthday surprise and helps find a family of squirrels a new tree-house home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles asks Bob to build him a roadside stall where he can sell ‘Pick Your Own’ produce. He has even had a Giant Carrot sign made to go on top of the stall to advertise his wares.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Knight Ghost
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate the ruins of Liverpool castle, Bolton and encounter a ghost on camera! Could this be the most compelling paranormal evidence ever?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Thackray Museum
programme.desc: The medical museum houses a great many objects from its distant hospital and workhouse past with a complete Victorian street scene on the lower level.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Armley Mills
programme.desc: Once the centre of industry Armley Mills is now a museum that is said to house the phantoms of many a lost soul. From children who were caught in the machinery to a bad tempered floorwalker who doesn’t like people in his mill.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Carr House
programme.desc: Part of a once splendorous manor and a history that goes back as far as Robin Hood, Carr House is the sight of many a paranormal occurrence.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT1
programme.desc: What was once a private home before becoming a sanctuary for the elderly, the abandoned Hill House is now an eerie shadow of its former glory, that houses empty rooms, strange noises and a plethora of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spirits of the Dead
programme.desc: The Whitley’s buy a farmhouse that houses a negative presence. The presence turns physical.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Protector
programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's old circus friend Tiger comes over for a visit because there is nothing more wonderful than passionately play chess with your best friend. But Masha has her own idea of a good time.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When Masha and Penguin enjoy a new game together, the pair go on a fun-filled adventure that sees them travel to Mars before heading out to the open sea to visit the Frog Princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha becomes a personal trainer to a group of bees who are eating too many sweets.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A mysterious night visitor terribly frightens the Bear and makes a real mess in his house. Masha knows the best way to overcome fear is to play with an invisible house spirit, but first he needs to be caught.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and the Bear argue over which colour is the most beautiful and a wall grew between them. Now the former friends set off in search of new friends, all of which turns into an exhausting competition.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When forest orderlies are powerless, dealing with a real epidemic is not an easy task. However, Masha gets down to business, which means everything will work out with the main thing being perky laughter.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear has a rival for winter fishing: a cat with the latest equipment. An unspoken competition begins between them and it is unclear if the latest miracle of technology will win out of the time-tested method.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie, but this time the roles are distributed differently. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Rosie tries to endure mother's everyday life.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha finds someone's umbrella in the forest and decides that she needs to return it urgently. After a fun search, the owner of the umbrella is found, but for some reason, they are still dissatisfied.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Christmas is a time of miracles and gifts and all the inhabitants of the forest have prepared performances for Santa Claus, but Masha was the best prepared, but the good wizard may not have enough gifts for her.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ever-hungry Wolves managed to unhook a huge tank for transporting live fish from the train. But there is a strange passenger among the fish.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's closet is full of strange and wildly interesting things. Masha and Panda find a very interesting thing there, which becomes a real puzzle for them.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The clouds look airy and similar to different sweets, probably very tasty. Masha and the Bear decide to take to the skies and try the airy dessert.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has a herbarium and Bear has a collection of rare stamps. Masha wants to collect something, but she just cannot figure out what exactly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie the Pig develops an incomprehensible rash after falling into a nettle bush.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Wolves find someone's pineapple in the forest. The temptation to eat it is stronger than the desire to find the real owner, until Masha appears at their table.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear and the other forest inhabitants are puzzled, huge circles appear in the field near the forest. Moreover, Masha's goat disappears.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha learns to perform tricks, like, a wave of the hands, a secret spell, but instead of a cute dove, a completely different bird flies out of the magic cylinder.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear is going on a romantic date with the Female Bear. The picnic promises to be perfect because all there are fragrant lilacs all around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: An unpleasant incident in the forest leaves the Bunny homeless. The hospitable Bear decides to shelter Bunny in his home.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear, awakened in the middle of winter, cannot fall asleep. First, the wolves do not let him sleep. Then Masha and Rosie invite him to go sledging.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a rainy night, a cute lamb appears on the doorstep of Bear's house. It needs attention, affection, and care. Masha happily begins to take care of the new baby.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a giant Snakes and Ladders game to Anita, who is having a pajama party with her friends; when Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn Anita's bed into a princess' carriage, it rolls out of her bedroom and into the streets of New Delhi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Ray who lives in Palau in the South Pacific wants to see a manta ray in the wild; Jett and the Wild Team do their best to help him find one, but end up trapped in a blue hole.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a friendship bracelet to Catalina for her pen pal Vo the Rover; when Vo goes missing, Astra and the Galaxy Wings take them to outer space to search for her.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Open Water: Open Water
programme.desc: When a couple is stranded while scuba diving, they soon realize they are in the middle of shark-infested waters in this intense, critically acclaimed thriller.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he breaks up with his girlfriend, he discovers his ex is actually the reluctant superhero, G Girl. A scorned woman, she unleashes her super powers to humiliate and torment him.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day
programme.desc: Perfect Day is a 1929 short comedy film starring Laurel and Hardy.

programme.title: Andy Warhol Presents: Blood for Dracula
programme.desc: Count Dracula (Udo Kier) knows that should he fail to drink the required amount of a pure virgin's blood, his living dead will be over. But the Count discovers not all of his female victims are as pure as they say they are.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Frontier Theater
programme.desc: Earp closes a show because the men attending are being ripped off by the girls in it. But then the owner wants to get even with Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Killing at Cowskin Creek
programme.desc: Big winners at the Keno House are being killed and robbed on the way back to their camps. Earp is unsure if it is crooked casino owners or someone else doing it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Englishman
programme.desc: George Peschauer is trying to sell an Englishman a ranch loaded with rustled cattle but a nosy female hotel owner is trying to protect the likable Englishman.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Desperate Half-Hour
programme.desc: The Kansas Kid is wanted by the Kingman Sheriff for robbery, murder, and wounding one of his deputies. The Kid returns to his parent's home where Earp arrests him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Necktie Party
programme.desc: Horses are being stolen around Wichita pushing the ranchers to want a necktie party. Their sights are set on a group of gypsies on Gus Cassen's property.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One of Jesse's Gang

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Pinkertons

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Addicted to Rage
programme.desc: Katie Socci stands by her fiancé, David, even after he's charged with stealing narcotics. But once she finally throws him out, he unleashes the deadly fury of a stalker scorned.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Virtual Nightmare
programme.desc: Up-and-coming pop star Elle Richardson is bombarded with threatening emails from a stranger hell-bent on destroying her career and ruining her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Cold Blood: On Her Own
programme.desc: Winston-Salem in 1982 is a city divided by race. And when a young white copy editor is raped and stabbed to death blocks from where she worked, the atmosphere is tense. Especially because eyewitnesses claim the killer is a black man in his twenties.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Illusion of Majesty
programme.desc: A wrong turn after exiting a slipstream sends the Andromeda into the Prolon system. They rescue an escape pod from certain disaster, but the pride wants it back.

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: The crew seeks for a lost colony of Nietzscheans and discovers another crew that has been secretly helping them.

programme.title: Andromeda: Day of Judgement, Day of Wrath
programme.desc: The crew installs a new AI in a new Commonwealth battleship, and naturally things don't go as they should.

programme.title: Andromeda: Shadows Cast by a Final Salute
programme.desc: Tyr convinces the Nietzscheans that he is the reincarnation of Drago Museveni.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Meg’s sister, Celia Rivers (Glenda Linscott), arrives at Drovers. Partly apprehensive, partly excited, Meg has always lived in the shadow of her glamorous, talented, singing sister. But Celia has arrived for a sea-change, or a country change.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Meg is full of preparations for her and Jodi’s leave taking, and in her excitement fails to notice that Jodi is harbouring a sliver of doubt.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: The Bachelor and Spinsters Ball, five hours drive from Gungellan, is one of the major social events on the country calendar.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Stevie’s daughter Rose (Basia A’hern) turns up at Drovers unexpectedly. She’s run away from her Mum to live with her Aunty Stevie.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: The weekend of Stevie and Alex’s rodeo school has finally arrived and they are excited with the prospect of turning their fresh faced students into rodeo stars.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: A minor car accident at the truckstop brings Stevie and Kane Morgan (Craig McLachlan) together for the first time. Stevie, at fault, is smitten by this handsome stranger when he tells her not to worry about the damage to his car.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: The family have been squatting at Leopard's Den as they prepare to make their last stand to prevent the bulldozers from destroying their home. Du Plessis and Fatani bring elephants and a giraffe to dissuade the construction crew from moving in.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Leopard's Den, the family are split across continents. Caroline, Liv and a heavily pregnant Alice are in the UK, while Danny and Du Plessis have remained in South Africa.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny returns to South Africa with Caroline, Liv and Charlotte. They are all excited to be back and are looking forward to seeing their new home, Clearwater Farm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Danny has been preparing his pitch for an Endangered Species Project. JLW, a pharmaceutical company, are looking to fund an environmental project and the family hope that this grant money will enable them to buy Leopard's Den and Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Ed release two cheetah brothers together, a symbol of their new partnership, but not all of the family are happy about this new start. Caroline is still furious at what she sees as Danny's betrayal of Du Plessis.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.desc: A young woman is found bound and strangled to death on the side of a road. As police retrace her final steps, they discover she was last seen being followed by a suspicious man in a cowboy hat.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: A man calls 911, saying his wife had been shot when she walked in on a robbery, and that he had used deadly force on the intruder. The investigation of what seems like an open-and-shut case of self defense reveals the secrets of several past murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: July 30th, 1980. Judy Linzey returned home in Oxnard, California. As she unlocked the front door, she noticed drops of blood on her porch and hurried inside and called out to her teenage daughter but there was no answer.

programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Vincent Tabak
programme.desc: When landscape architect Joanna Yeates disappeared after work Christmas drinks, the nation was gripped by the search for her. Tragedy struck on Christmas day morning when her body was found in a snow-covered lane. But who had killed the young woman

programme.title: Killer Britain: Lewis Daynes
programme.desc: Breck Bednar was a loving, family-oriented 14-year-old who had lots of friends and excelled at school. But he was also seduced by the world of online gaming. He didn’t see the dangers when an older teen made lucrative job offers.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder On The Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Killer Town: Layland, WV
programme.desc: James Duncan’s family searches for him, but the atrocities of his murder are soon revealed and they are as shocking as who is behind his brutal death.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: Moesha: Let’s Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Moesha crashes in Niecy’s dorm room after a late-night Pendulum party and is horrified to discover that Nicey has also let a male sleep in the room.

programme.title: Moesha: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The arrival of Frank’s Aunt Hattie brings a shocking revelation about Frank that turns the rest of the family – especially Dorian and Moesha – against him.

programme.title: Moesha: Color Him Father
programme.desc: Still reeling from the news that Frank is Dorian’s biological father, the Mitchells prepare for Dorian’s 17th birthday bash, a party that grows more and more elaborate and expensive as Dorian takes full advantage of Frank’s guilt.

programme.title: Moesha: Family Affair
programme.desc: Still angry at Frank for keeping his true relationship to Dorian a secret for so long, Moesha decides not to introduce her father at an upcoming 'Businessman of the Year' awards banquet.

programme.title: Moesha: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Hoping to boost the confidence of her new roommate, Theresa, Moesha asks Hakeem’s good-looking friend to ask Theresa on a date – but can’t leave well enough alone when the date is a success.

programme.title: Moesha: Gimme A Break
programme.desc: Moesha, Niecy, and Hakeem go to Santa Barbara for Spring Break. A campus rival spreads false information that Mo is 'easy' when her ex-boyfriend shows interest in Moesha.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lemon Squeeze Episode
programme.desc: Gigi uses an adequate exercise when the family refuses to stop fighting with each other.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mother's-in-Law Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne's overprotective mother arrives and causes tension between her and Nick when she questions Nick's abilities as a husband.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Tit for Tat Episode
programme.desc: A newly hired, attractive woman threatens Nick's job at the station.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Quarantine Episode
programme.desc: When Marilyn brings a dangerous flu back from a trip to Mexico, the family must stay inside their house under quarantine.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The V.I.P. Tickets Episode
programme.desc: Nick angers Suzanne when he invites Martin to an exclusive sporting event before inviting his wife.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Dances Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey auditions to dance for a famous rapper's music video, but she later backs out after meeting with the powerful, demanding choreographer.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Career Day Episode
programme.desc: For Career Day, Nick serves as a guest speaker for Kevin's class, but his message ultimately confuses Kevin's classmates.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The House Sitter's Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne's next door's neighbors become irresponsible house sitters.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Nick Gets Promoted Episode
programme.desc: Nick struggles to prove himself when he is promoted to co-host alongside the lazy, arrogant Brick Street.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Big Loan Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne tries to keep Nick's birthday gift a surprise by taking out a loan from Marilyn.

programme.title: NEW Burning Love: Dancing - Up in Flames
programme.desc: The big finale. The remaining three couples dance their way to the finish line. The winner of the $900 is finally revealed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals. A tip leads them to the alleged perpetrators.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a farmer's wife disappears, the tests of a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist lead to a surprising revelation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When someone dies under mysterious circumstances, the spouse almost always is a suspect - especially if they are in bed, sleeping beside the individual at the time of their death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a patient in a hospital emergency room said he cut his hand on a dumpster, the doctor recognised the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Cutting-edge DNA science finally reveals the identity of the 'Phoenix Canal Killer' who terrorised the Arizona city in the early 1990s and brutally took the lives of two women.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanoon Delight

programme.desc: A small fender bender leads to a big argument between Appa and Umma. Jung second-guesses a birthday greeting. Janet goes from mocker to mocked.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gay Marriage Legalized
programme.desc: Commitment looms for Jordan and Keegan after gay marriage is finally legalized.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Love Reeks
programme.desc: (S03E008) Jake provides Sydney with refuge after learning of the attack. Amanda reveals that Jane and Chris have gone to Las Vegas, and Sydney realizes that Chris is planning to make good on his promise to marry Jane.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dr. Jekyll Saves His Hide
programme.desc: (S03E009) Sydney plans to leave town to avoid her problems with Chris, but Jake convinces her to stay and give their relationship a chance. Alison claims to have accepted Billy's relationship with Susan but begins hitting the bottle.

programme.title: Melrose Place: And Justice for None

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Days of Wine and Vodka
programme.desc: (S03E011) Zack encourages Alison to buy an expensive new car and skip work. Billy and Susan confront Alison during Thanksgiving dinner, but she reacts angrily and storms out.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Magic of the Moon: Goddess of the Night
programme.desc: This part is dedicated to the myths and legends of the moon.

programme.title: Magic of the Moon: The 8th Continent?
programme.desc: The time is ripe for a new lunar mission.

programme.title: Quest for the Mystery of Rapa Nui
programme.desc: Archaeologists find amazing evidence on the mystery of Easter Island.

programme.title: Scotland - Highlands and Islands
programme.desc: An affectionate portrait of Scotland, with its unspoiled landscapes and unconventional inhabitants.

programme.title: Secret Societies
programme.desc: The secret brotherhood of the Illuminati was only active for ten years. They dreamed of having members of their brotherhood occupy crucial positions of power. Rumours that ‘the enlightened ones’ still exist in secret cannot be dispelled.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Scattered across the warm South China Sea, Indonesia’s islands are a melting pot for evolution and diversity. Here, rich forests, rivers and coastlines have offered pockets of isolation, enabling animals to develop incredible behaviours and looks.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: How have Indonesia’s remote and mysterious islands become home to so many of the natural world’s most extraordinary giants? From a unique species of elephant, and the world’s longest snake, to a crab almost a metre wide that climbs trees

programme.title: Wild Asia: Two Worlds
programme.desc: A dramatic and poignant portrayal of the fragile alliances and desperate strategies for survival adopted by three species of animals caught in the no-man’s-land where the human and natural worlds collide.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 4
programme.desc: Still, in Melbourne, supermums Kim & Suong take to the kitchen to share the flavours of their Vietnamese heritage, while at the table a shocking insult sparks the biggest blow-up of the season!

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 5
programme.desc: Teams travel to the Sunshine Coast where surfie couple Ash & Matty are in the zone for their big debut.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 6
programme.desc: Teams travel to Brisbane where best buddies Stuss & Steve set out on a culinary odyssey.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 7
programme.desc: Teams travel to Western Australia where “Perth’s best waitresses” Stella & Jazzey are aiming to serve up a night to remember.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: In the season finale, Ian tries to bring it all together.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client break all the rules and build the ultimate boat-inspired, open-aired cruiser. (Part 1)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client continue the ultimate open-aired cruiser build and debut it a top West Coast car show. (Part 2)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian gets a call from a top Hollywood picture car coordinator and works his magic to get a vintage race car back in action.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian is commissioned to help build a wild, massive mobile floating party island for a prestigious festival in the Nevada desert (Burning Man).

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: A new client comes into the picture with a vintage desire; a hand-built motorcycle in the vein of early Harley Davidson’s, but with a Full Custom twist. And later, Ian pushes the envelope with a cool electric bike build for himself.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: To Touch The Moon
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Return of the Masked Rider
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Song of the Wild West
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Power of the Mind
programme.desc: A housewife who believes a psychic vision helped her solve a murder, and a man who remembers every moment of his life with pinpoint accuracy. Plus, a healer who claims to cure diseases through prayer

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: A yacht vanishes on Lake Michigan and mysterious lights over the Indian Ocean send a nation into panic.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Rendlesham
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years a fascinating pattern has emerged, linking UFOs with military personnel and installations. One of the most significant of these events took place on British soil in 1980. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Alan Godfrey / 'Abductions' ep
programme.desc: This episode delves into the most alarming of alleged extra-terrestrial experiences: alien abduction. The most remarkable case on British soil was the abduction of Yorkshire policeman Alan Godfrey. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: SETI
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers at the Pan-STARRS observatory saw something strange in our solar system: an object they named ‘Oumuamua’, the very first observed visitor from interstellar space. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: This first part of the series introduces the first tanks being deployed on the battlefields in northern France during WWI and describes the devastating effect these steel monsters had on an infantry confronted with them for the very first time.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The second episode starts on the morning of the 22nd of June 1941 when the Germans launched operation Barbarossa, the code name for the invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell in love. Despite never meeting, Tony proposed over the phone and Colleen accepted! Nev and Max help her face reality to reveal the man she's engaged to! (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on their biggest case as they track down the infamous Shelly Chartier to uncover truths about the celeb catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star Chris Andersen. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Hills: Drama Follows Them / Better Off As Friends
programme.desc: Lauren runs into Spencer at Stephanie's birthday, and the birthday girl is torn between her brother and friend. Someone is fired at People's Revolution, and Whitney must step up. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: The Hills: Boys Make Girls Cry / Something Has To Change
programme.desc: A trip to Vegas breaks down when Audrina snubs Lauren. Brody brings up Stephanie's past, and the boys end up in jail. Heidi's sister wants to move in, but Spencer wants her out. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: The City: Mingling with the Commoners
programme.desc: Olivia invites Jay's band to perform at one of her charity events but her plan backfires when the band is disrespected on-stage, leaving Whitney and Olivia at odds. (s1, ep8)

programme.title: The City: Unexpected Roommates
programme.desc: Adam kicks Jay out of his apartment so Allie can move in & Jay asks Whitney if he can live with her. Erin's plan to juggle two guys backfires & leaves her alone on New Year's Eve. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Miami for the weekend, Jay runs into his ex-girlfriend Danielle and Whitney wonders if the rumours about them might be true after all. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me
programme.desc: Whitney's crushed to learn that Jay's mysterious night out was spent with his ex-girlfriend, Danielle. Olivia steals the credit from Whitney when they style an ELLE cover shoot! (S1, ep11)

programme.title: The City: I'm Sorry Whit
programme.desc: When Jay finds out he's going on tour, Whitney isn't willing to give up on the relationship, but when Jay doesn't give her a choice their relationship ends in a tearful goodbye. (S1, ep12)

programme.title: The City: Finale
programme.desc: Fresh from a breakup with Jay, Whitney questions if she made the right decision leaving LA. An opportunity opens up at work, but Olivia is after the same position. (S1, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Sleeping With The Frenemy
programme.desc: Olivia's working at ELLE Magazine, but meets her match in co-worker Erin Kaplan. Whitney returns to work for Kelly Cutrone, & an old friend's in town, looking to crash with her. (S1, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah introduces her boyfriend to Debra, Catelynn supports her own mom as Tyler's dad goes to court and Bentley has a hard time adjusting to Maci's new house. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: In a visit to Texas, Farrah challenges Daniel about their relationship, Maci and Ryan argue about Ryan's new girlfriend and Amber looks for a new home for her and Leah. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Bentley's birthday leads to a blowout between Maci and Ryan, Farrah spends time with Sophia before saying goodbye for a month and Amber and Gary come up with a custody plan for Leah. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber has second thoughts about giving Gary full custody, Catelynn helps Tyler cope with emotions about his dad and they both reflect on the adoption, and Farrah misses Sophia. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with Farrah, Maci, Catelynn and Amber from the final season of Teen Mom. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: A C-47 transport plane, with a crew of four, is ferrying 24 trainee P-47 fighter pilots from the Bruning Army Air Field in Nebraska to the South Dakotan Pierre Army Air Field for advanced training.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber
programme.desc: Rise of the Bomber: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: War Without Boundaries
programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The Means To Victory
programme.desc: The Means to Victory: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The World At War
programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler: The film explores the roots of Adolf Hitler and traces the story of his life from the town of his birth to his final days.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wardens: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: In 2012 The small community of Whitefish Montana was shocked by the useless killing of over 20 deer. Region 1 Wardens think outside the box to put a stop to this heinous crime.

programme.title: Wardens: Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens: Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens: Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk being poached and illegally tagged deer. But the Future of hunting is bright with a new batch of hunters.

programme.title: Wardens: Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive Winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: Wardens: Wasted Dummy
programme.desc: This week Warden Lesofski searches out a hunting party that left their elk to rot. While Region 2 Wardens rush into a volatile situation after their decoy is shot from the road.

programme.title: Wardens: Minor Mistakes
programme.desc: A riverside check station catches four minors with no life jackets and a lot of alcohol. Then Warden Golie stops two car full of minors that should not be behind the wheel.

programme.title: Wardens: True Lies
programme.desc: A check station outside of Billings stops a guy who refuses to tell the truth. Investigating who shot the deer reveals a long history of game violations.

programme.title: Wardens: Head Case
programme.desc: Someone shot and stashed the head of a trophy bull elk. Wardens spend months staking out the head. Once it is moved they use high tech equipment to locate the head and capture the suspect.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Liverpool
programme.desc: The famous port's wealthy history has inextricably contributed to its prosperous underworld, wherein the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4

programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pranks for Nothing / Zombie Dearest
programme.desc: Eager to regain his lost prank mojo, McGee releases a mischievous pixy named Hanky Pranky.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Adventures in Bottomland / Golem My Way?
programme.desc: During an unfair polo match, McGee falls down an armadillo and wakes up in 'Bottomland.'

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Buttastic Journey / Monkey See, Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: McGee is shrunk down to the size of an atom!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Stage Fright / Frankenfixer
programme.desc: The Bottom Dwellers stage Armand's awful play but a jealous Suzi unleashes a curse on the production.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Eclipsalypso / Apocalypse Squirt
programme.desc: McGee summons the Moon Dervish who will bring the Apocalypse unless a sasquatch dances for him.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT World Championship

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 1
